revision.comment: allow image=none

{{{below}}}

revision.comment: add plainlist class, which makes adds semantic value when multiple elements are used. any problems with this, please let me know

{{{below}}}

revision.comment: [[Special:Contributions/Sonchou|Sonchou]] ([[User talk:Sonchou|会話]]) による版を ネイ による版へ[[H:RV|巻き戻し]]
「[[Template:Side box]]」を保護しました: [[WP:HRT|影響が特に大きいテンプレート]] ([編集=管理者のみ許可] (無期限) [移動=管理者のみ許可] (無期限))
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Side_box]]: importing template for usage on this wiki. It is used a lot
revision.text: {{#invoke:Side box|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Reverting edits from past 90 minutes

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: re-importing and overwriting due to the weird script failure
